scripts.build:backend: dotnet build Services/AuthService/AuthService.slnx && dotnet build Services/UserManager/user-manager.sln && dotnet build Services/AuditService/AuditService.slnx
scripts.dev: npm run build:backend && concurrently -n auth,users,audit,worker,web -c blue,green,yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:users" "npm run dev:audit" "npm run dev:audit-worker" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.db:migrate: dotnet ef database update --project Services/AuthService/AuthService.Infrastructure --startup-project Services/AuthService/AuthService.Api && dotnet ef database update --project Services/UserManager/UserManager.Infrastructure --startup-project Services/UserManager/UserManager.Api
